return(function(W,q,V,o,w,k,F,i,j,f,n,C,h,Q,a,x,I,Y,b,t,O,U,A,N)f,j,h,I,b,Y,a,Q,O,U,t,C,x,N,A,n,i=function(W,X)local q=I(X)local V=function(V)return x(W,{V},X,q)end return V end,function(W,X)local
